privileged_info_summary: The document_hpi task involves creating a clinical encounter and documenting the history of present illness (HPI) for patient Dwight Dach (DOB: March 21, 1998, PID: 6) in NOSH ChartingSystem. The environment runs NOSH2 (shihjay2/nosh2:latest) with MariaDB 10.11 database backend. Dwight Dach is one of 20 synthetic patients pre-loaded from Synthea, a MITRE open-source synthetic patient generator for Massachusetts cohort data. Task execution parameters: timeout 300 seconds, max 40 steps, sparse reward. The provider login is demo_provider (password: Provider1234!) associated with Hillside Family Medicine practice (practice_id=1). All patient data is synthetic, generated deterministically from Synthea, not real protected health information.
